summary: Iter 119 - Caisse thresholds (manager/direction/employee) GET/PUT/DELETE + UI admin panel + 50% discount on monsieur-orders + 'la Direction' rename. Backend 9/9 pytest PASS. minor.issue: stock_movements.reason still hardcoded 'Mme la Directrice Générale - Commande #...' at /app/backend/server.py:5589 — should be 'la Direction' per spec.

ui_bugs.issue: Sub-tab label still shows 'MME LA D.G.' (uppercase) — at /app/frontend/src/pages/caisse/components/BonsTab.jsx line 73. Should be 'LA DIRECTION' to match the renaming spec.

action_items: Rename label 'MME LA D.G.' to 'LA DIRECTION' in /app/frontend/src/pages/caisse/components/BonsTab.jsx line 73.
Update stock_movements reason text in /app/backend/server.py:5589 from 'Mme la Directrice Générale - Commande #...' to 'la Direction - Commande #...' (or similar).

manager-orders/cap-status response field name should be standardized; tests had to probe 'max' OR 'cap'.
test_credentials: Admin / Nikeland2026 (caisse admin login). PIN is wrong via auto-fill; you must click Admin tab first.

No cleanup endpoint deleted them; minor noise in DB. Thresholds reset to defaults at end of test module (autouse fixture).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend endpoints fully verified by pytest /app/backend/tests/test_caisse_thresholds_iter119.py. UI flow (save/badge/reset/toast 'Seuils mis à jour') verified end-to-end via Playwright. Two residual rename leftovers must be fixed by main agent: BonsTab.jsx:73 ('MME LA D.G.') and server.py:5589 (stock movement reason). After fixes, re-run the backend pytest + a quick grep `grep -rni 'mme la d\.g\|directrice générale' /app/frontend/src /app/backend` should return zero results.
rca_of_the_issue: Renaming task missed 2 occurrences because: (1) BonsTab.jsx:73 uses uppercase 'MME LA D.G.' which wasn't covered by case-sensitive replace; (2) server.py line 5589 is a string deep inside stock_movements creation that wasn't grep-replaced. Both confirmed by `grep -rni` after the fact.
